snippet.title: Civil War | Official Trailer HD | A24
snippet.description:
SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/A24subscribe

From writer/director Alex Garland and starring Kirsten Dunst, Wagner Moura, Stephen McKinley Henderson, and Cailee Spaeny. CIVIL WAR – In Theaters April 12, 2024. Now Available On Demand.

HOW TO WATCH: https://bit.ly/CivilWar-OnDemand

RELEASE DATE: April 12, 2024
DIRECTOR: Alex Garland
CAST: Kirsten Dunst, Wagner Moura, Stephen McKinley Henderson, and Cailee Spaeny
